title: JAOPCA
description: Just A Ore Processing Compatibility Attempt
body:
Looking for translators!
If you are translating, you must also submit to the JAOPCA Material Localizations GitHub repository.

JAOPCA (Just A Ore Processing Compatibility Attempt) is a mod that aims to add ore processing compatibilty to many mods by dynamically adding items and recipes, and is inspired by AOBD (Another One Bites the Dust) by ganymedes01.

JAOPCA 1.13+ does not attempt to make ores that do not have tags be supported by JAOPCA, please use KubeJS, Open Loader, or Json Things to do this manually.

JAOPCA is not a mod that unifies materials, please use UniDict or Almost Unified.

Currently supported versions: 1.12.2-2.3, 1.16.5, 1.18.2, 1.19.2, 1.20.1, 1.21.1

Information for JAOPCA 1.12.2-2.3:

JAOPCA 2.3 for 1.12.2 is aimed to have less redundant items and being more user friendly, and requires WrapUp.

Supports:
AbyssalCraft
Advanced Rocketry
Applied Energistics 2
Buildcraft Ore Processing
Embers Rekindled
Ender IO
EssentialCraft 4 Unofficial
Foundry
FuturePack
HBM's Nuclear Tech Mod
IndustrialCraft 2 Experimental
Integrated Dynamics
Magneticraft
Mekanism
Minestrappolation 5
Powered Thingies
QMD
Railcraft
Static Power
TechReborn
Thaumcraft
Tinker's Construct

This mod also contains support for some mods that do not register their Ore Dictionary entries in the time/form JAOPCA expects.

Support for mods that register their OreDictionary not early enough or are inconsistent:
Advent of Ascension 3
Calculator
EvilCraft
Galacticraft
GalaxySpace
Mekanism
Quark
RFTools
TAIGA

Please let me know if you have a suggestion or if you want a mod to be supported.

Information for JAOPCA 1.16.5:

JAOPCA 3.4 for Minecraft Forge 1.16.5 is aimed to have less redundant items, being more user friendly, and supporting other customization mods.

Supports:

Assembly Line Machines

Blood Magic

Futurepack

Industrial Reborn
Integrated Dynamics

Thermal Expansion
Tinkers' Construct
Voluminous Energy
WTBW Machines

Please let me know if you have a suggestion or if you want a mod to be supported.

Information for JAOPCA 1.7.10:

JAOPCA W.0 for 1.7.10 is an experimental project aimed to be a replacement for AOBD, supporting more mods and being more user friendly.

Supports:
AbyssalCraft

This mod also contains support for some mods that do not register their Ore Dictionary entries in the time/form JAOPCA expects.

Support for mods that register their OreDictionary not early enough or are inconsistent:

Please let me know if you have a suggestion or if you want a mod to be supported.
